Defendant'S Demurrer To Complaint
Off Calendar Nov-05-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, John L. Boos of the law offices of K&L Gates LLP (Tel: 415.882.8200; Email: jack.boos@klgates.com) appears as counsel for opposing party, plaintiff

Attorney, Joseph Petta of the law offices of Shute Mihaly & Weinberger (Tel: 510.910.3851; Email: petta@smwlaw.com) appears as counsel for moving party, defendant

Attorney, Shari B. Posner, Deputy Attorney General of the State of California Department of Justice (Tel: 510) 879-0856; Email: shari.posner@doj.ca.gov) appears as counsel for moving party, defendants

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides on record as reflected in the notes of the Certified Shorthand Reporter.

Defendant's Demurrer To Complaint is TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION by Judge Ethan Schulman on Nov-05-2020. Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com

***

After the hearing the demurrer is sustained without leave to amend, per written order signed and filed Nov-05-2020.

Demurrer To Complaint
Off Calendar Oct-20-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant's Demurrer to Complaint is transferred to department 302 to be heard on November 5, 2020 per the order of the presiding judge. Challenge to the Honorable Charles F. Haines is accepted. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: W. Trupek, Not Reported. (D501)
